title: ixora baileyana
intro: Ixora baileyana, also known as the jungle geranium or Scarlet Ixora, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to the tropical forests of the Western Ghats in India. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce fever. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and acting as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. In herbal preparations, Ixora baileyana is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be applied topically as a paste or cream to promote wound healing.
